title: The Giants Rush Toward Crisis
description: On pages 7–9, this part follows Unknown person #7, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Giants, Dorry as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In exchange for a fleeting span of life, thou shalt receive...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: under MUS Dominion, Thou Art Bound by neither Logic nor reason.

dialogue.text: For the De- Mow is The Very Form existence was fitted to assume!!

dialogue.text: She said demon?! What's she try- ing to do?!

dialogue.text: His face is terrifying!! Did he really turn into a demon?! Give us our Bossss back!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Crisis through 23 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
